text_raw: There is truly no end to what can be learned.
text_clean: There is truly no end to what can be learned.

text_raw: Oh, excuse me! Can we speak for a moment?
text_clean: Oh, excuse me! Can we speak for a moment?

text_raw: I'll only take a second of your time!
text_clean: I'll only take a second of your time!

text_raw:
I came all the way from {Staticinfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_Faction_JiJeong_Temple#Jijeong Temple}, if you can believe it,
seeking a precious mushroom that grows wild around here.
text_clean:
I came all the way from {Staticinfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_Faction_JiJeong_Temple#Jijeong Temple}, if you can believe it,
seeking a precious mushroom that grows wild around here.

text_raw: But all I found was thick, choking smoke... As I turned to leave, it hit me!
text_clean: But all I found was thick, choking smoke... As I turned to leave, it hit me!

text_raw:
It was not the smoke that troubled me,
but my own obsession with finding the fabled mushroom.
text_clean:
It was not the smoke that troubled me,
but my own obsession with finding the fabled mushroom.

text_raw: As you journey on, keep your heart clear, and do not let greed cloud your gaze.
text_clean: As you journey on, keep your heart clear, and do not let greed cloud your gaze.

text_raw: It's a good story, you'd do well to listen til the end!
text_clean: It's a good story, you'd do well to listen til the end!
